info.description: Multi-tenant RAG + LLM site assistant API.
info.title: AI Site Assistant API

post.description: Sends a chat message using tenant API key authentication. Site context is derived from site ID path parameter.
Creates an async chat request and returns a request ID for polling.

get.description: Returns status of an async chat request by request ID.

Returns all API keys for a tenant. Only tenant owner can access this endpoint and only for level2/level3 plans.

post.description: Creates a new tenant-scoped API key. The plaintext API key is returned only once in this response.

model.description: AI model to use, defaults to site's default_model or gpt-4o-mini
